description: Geometric Encoding Intelligence System (GEIS). Octahedral state management, tensor operations, and geometric sensing. The core runtime for translating physical signals into 3-bit octahedral states.

octahedral_state.description: Manages 8-state octahedral encoding. Each state is a 3-bit vertex on SHAPE.OCTA with eigenvalue triple and phi-coherence score. Gray code transitions ensure single-bit changes between adjacent states.

state_tensor.role: Tensor-based state representation for multi-dimensional encoding
state_tensor.description: Extends octahedral states to tensor form. Maps geometry (F09) and topology (F20) into computable structures. Enables batch operations on state arrays.

geometric_encoder.role: Physical signal to octahedral state encoder
geometric_encoder.description: Core encoder pipeline: physical measurement → domain normalization → octahedral state. Information (F03) is encoded; measurement (F14) is the method.

geometric_sense.role: Geometric sensing — spatial awareness through octahedral encoding
geometric_sense.description: Geometric sensing layer. Measurement (F14) through spatial navigation (F15). Detects geometric patterns in physical signals.

geometric_sensor_sim.description: Sensor simulation for testing and validation. Generates synthetic signals and verifies encoder accuracy.

cube_sim_3d.description: 3D simulation of cubic containment. Matter (F08) and engineering (F11) families. Tests structural integrity under load.

rosetta_connections.sensor_registry_extension: GEIS sensors extend the Rosetta SENSOR_REGISTRY with geometric sensing channels
rosetta_connections.seed_physics_link: Octahedral states ARE seed amplitudes — GEIS provides the runtime for computing them
